products.name: FATHER OF INSANE
products.title: Father of Insane by Promoleculesâ„¢ is an ultra high-stimulant pre-workout designed for experienced athletes who demand extreme energy, explosive strength, intense focus, and unstoppable endurance.
products.description: Father of Insane by Promoleculesâ„¢ is an ultra high-stimulant pre-workout engineered for serious athletes who need extreme energy, laser-focused concentration, and unmatched endurance.  This intense formula delivers powerful stimulation through its 5200 mg Father of Insane Blend and 450 mg total caffeine, giving you explosive performance every session.  Manufactured in a GMP-certified facility using premium domestic and international ingredients, this pre-workout is designed ONLY for advanced users.
products.howToUse: Mix 1 scoop (30g) with 200-250ml of water or milk. Consume after workout or as recommended by a healthcare professional.
whatToAvoid: Do not exceed the recommended dosage
Not suitable for individuals under 18
Avoid if allergic to milk or whey
Consult a doctor if pregnant or under medication

products.name: HYDRAPUMP+
products.title: HydraPump+ is a liquid hydration and muscle pump formula featuring Liquid Glycerol, Citrulline Malate, and electrolytes for enhanced endurance, pumps, and fluid balance.
products.description: HydraPump+ by Promolecules Essential is a rapid hydration and explosive pump formula designed for athletes, lifters, and endurance performers. Powered by Liquid Glycerol, Citrulline Malate, and high-quality electrolytes (Sodium, Magnesium, Potassium), this formula helps retain fluid in muscles, improve blood flow, enhance pumps, and delay dehydration. Ideal for long training sessions, endurance events, and pump-focused workouts.

products.name: THERMO NUKE XT
products.title: Thermo Nuke XTâ„¢ is an ultra-high potency thermogenic fat destroyer engineered for advanced users seeking extreme fat loss, explosive energy, and intense focus. Not for beginners.
products.description: Thermo Nuke XT by Promoleculesâ„¢ is the strongest fat-destroying thermogenic formulated only for advanced users.  Powered by a 650 mg Nuke Thermo XT Blend, this supplement rapidly increases metabolism, elevates body temperature, boosts energy, and accelerates fat oxidation.  With patented ingredients like CitraSyn 50, 2XCAFF, and GBBxt, this formula is engineered to deliver extreme fat loss results while providing unstoppable focus and endurance.  Manufactured in a high-quality environment, Thermo Nuke XT is designed for athletes and experienced individuals aiming to shred fat aggressively.
